author: ANN

title: From Overshadowed to Overpowered TV Anime Announces More Cast
content: The NBCUniversal booth at the AnimeJapan 2026 convention hosted a stage panel for the anime of Kentarou's From Overshadowed to Overpowered (Rakudai Kenja no Gakuin Musō: Nidome no Tensei, S-Rank Cheat Majutsushi Bōkenroku) manga based on Arata Shiraishi's Rakudai Kenja no Gakuin Musō: Nido Tensei Shita Saikyō Kenja,…
author: ANN

title: Sparks of Tomorrow TV Anime's Promo Video Reveals Theme Songs, July 5 Debut, More Cast
content: The staff for the television anime of Hiro Yūki's Sparks of Tomorrow (20 Seiki Denki Mokuroku) novel revealed the show's promotional video, theme song information, more cast, and key visual on Sunday.
author: ANN

title: The Irregular at Magic High School: Yotsuba Succession Arc Film's Main Trailer Reveals Theme Song by LiSA
content: The stage presentation for the Mahōka Kōkō no Rettōsei: Yotsuba Keishō-hen (The Irregular at Magic High School THE MOVIE - Yotsuba Succession Arc -) anime film at the AnimeJapan 2026 event on Sunday revealed the film's third key visual, additional staff members, and main trailer, which reveals and previews the theme…
author: ANN

title: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten Season 2 Casts Marika Kōno
content: The special stage panel for the television anime of Saekisan's The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten (Otonari no Tenshi-sama ni Itsu no Ma ni ka Dame Ningen ni Sareteita Ken) light novel series announced another cast member for the anime's second season on Sunday.
author: ANN

title: Tsutomu Nihei's Tower Dungeon Manga Promoted in Video With Animated Clips
content: On Tuesday, the official YouTube channel for Kodansha 's Monthly Shonen Sirius magazine started streaming a promotional video to commemorate the release of Tsutomu Nihei 's sixth Tower Dungeon manga volume.
author: ANN

title: Love Live! Hasu no Sora Jōgakuin School Idol Club Film's Trailer Previews Music
content: A "music trailer" for the Love Live! Hasu no Sora Jogakuin School Idol Club Bloom Garden Party 3D anime film debuted on Tuesday. The trailer introduces the insert song "Hana Sakeba Yume Kakeru" (When the Flowers Bloom, Dreams Take Off").
author: ANN

title: My Dear Detective's Natsumi Ito Launches New Manga Series
content: Natsumi Ito announced on X (formerly Twitter) on Friday a new manga series Bungō no Oyatsu (Snacks of Literary Giants) that will launch on Futabasha's Web Action platform on May 29. The series follows rookie editor Tsubame's attempts to bribe sweet-toothed author Uguisudani with treats to submit work by the deadline.
author: ANN

title: Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to Novels Gets Manga Adaptation
